name: @narada2/site-registry-mcp
description: User Site MCP surface for the canonical Narada Site Registry.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @narada2/mcp-e2e-harness build && pnpm build && node dist/test/protocol-smoke.test.js && node dist/test/site-registry-mcp.test.js && node dist/test/site-fabric-registry-e2e.test.js
